what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG icon showing a folded brochure or leaflet outline with a center fold and short horizontal content lines on both panels.
observations: Uses an inline SVG with viewBox 0 0 24 24 and explicit width and height of 24.
Sets fill to none and stroke to currentColor for themeable line rendering.
Uses stroke width 1.5 with round line caps and round joins.
Contains three path elements: the brochure outline, the vertical center fold, and grouped horizontal detail marks.
standouts: Single compact SVG with no embedded styles or metadata.
Visual detail suggests brochure content without using text elements.
conventions: Uses stroke-only geometry with rounded caps and joins.
Combines multiple short detail strokes into one path command.
notes: A compact outline brochure icon intended to inherit color from its surrounding UI.
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a brochure icon, and the SVG renders a brochure-like folded document with panel details.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable brochure or leaflet symbol for interface contexts where document-style collateral is referenced.
contribution: Contributes a themeable stroke-based brochure icon with folded-panel geometry and simple content-line cues for systems that need document or collateral imagery.
summary_for_embedding: A 24px stroke-only SVG brochure icon using currentColor, folded-sheet outline geometry, a central fold line, and short horizontal panel details.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing a brochure or leaflet as a reusable themeable UI icon.
